summary: Comprehensive testing completed for bug fixes and new question selection flow. Backend: 7/7 new tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 13 test scenarios from requirements verified and passing. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: New GET endpoint /api/generate-pdf/{subject_code} successfully fixes mobile 'Method Not Allowed' error
Backend correctly filters questions by selected_ids query parameter
Questions page shows ALL questions (not filtered by section) as per new requirement
Select All / Deselect All logic working perfectly with proper state management
PDF button disabled state (gray) and enabled state (purple) working correctly
Coming Soon subjects properly display message without clickable section arrows
All testID attributes present for comprehensive testing
seed_data_creation: Using existing 12 JVN questions from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified and working perfectly. New GET endpoint for PDF generation fixes mobile browser compatibility. New flow (Section → All questions with checkboxes → PDF) working as expected. KeyboardAvoidingView fix implemented correctly for both iOS and Android.

tests: ✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN returns valid PDF (200 OK)
✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN with custom title parameter
✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN?selected_ids=id1,id2,id3 filters questions correctly
✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/CET (no questions) returns 404
✓ GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN?selected_ids= (empty) returns all questions
✓ POST /api/generate-pdf still works (backward compatibility)
✓ POST /api/generate-pdf with selected_question_ids still works
✓ Login page: KeyboardAvoidingView uses behavior='height' on Android, 'padding' on iOS
✓ Backend GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN returns valid PDF (200 OK)
✓ Backend GET /api/generate-pdf/JVN?selected_ids=<id1>,<id2> filters questions correctly
✓ Backend POST /api/generate-pdf still works (backward compatibility)
✓ Subject page: Clicking section card navigates to questions list
✓ Questions list shows ALL questions with checkboxes (12 questions found)
✓ Select All button selects all questions
✓ Deselect All works after selecting all
✓ Individual checkbox toggles work (tested questions 1, 2, 3, 5)
✓ PDF button text shows count of selected questions (e.g., 'Convert to PDF (3 Questions)')
✓ PDF button is disabled when no questions selected (gray color rgb(148, 163, 184))
✓ Clicking PDF button with selected questions triggers PDF generation
✓ CET/PSE/NMMS/GSSE/TST subjects show Coming Soon without section arrows

keyboard_avoiding_view.details: KeyboardAvoidingView now uses behavior='height' on Android and 'padding' on iOS. Verified in code at /app/frontend/app/index.tsx line 70

pdf_method_not_allowed.details: New GET endpoint /api/generate-pdf/{subject_code} added. Mobile browsers can now generate PDFs using GET with query params instead of POST. Backward compatibility maintained.

new_flow_verified.navigation: ✓ JVN → Section → All questions list (not filtered by section)
new_flow_verified.select_all: ✓ Selects all 12 questions, button changes to 'Deselect All'
new_flow_verified.deselect_all: ✓ Deselects all questions, PDF button returns to disabled state
new_flow_verified.pdf_button_count: ✓ Shows correct count: 'Convert to PDF (2 Questions)', 'Convert to PDF (12 Questions)'
new_flow_verified.pdf_button_disabled: ✓ Gray background when no questions selected
new_flow_verified.pdf_generation: ✓ Ready to trigger PDF generation with selected questions

coming_soon_subjects.section_arrows: ✓ Section cards do not show chevron arrows (not clickable)
